clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Hi <@1403088581341347870>, how are you? 👋

I'm just reaching out to confirm that I received all the photos and videos you sent. Great content! This material is exactly what we need to make the ads stand out and grab people's attention. 📸🎥

I’ve already uploaded everything, and the updates to your campaigns are finished. The new ads featuring your media are approved and officially running! 🚀

Now, we’ll monitor the performance over the next few days to see which visuals generate the best results and attract more leads.

I’ll keep you posted on any updates. Let’s have a great week! 👊

clientMessages.author: sevilla_rw_96091
clientMessages.content: Hi David, I’m doing well, thank you for checking in! I’m glad the photos and videos were helpful. I appreciate you getting everything uploaded and the campaigns running so quickly. Looking forward to seeing how the new ads perform over the next few days.💪🎯
